rules.desc: 角色一致性增强 — 所有 shot 的 positive prompt 强制追加角色锁定语句
rules.value: Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.

rules.desc: 场景连续性 — 非首镜追加场景布局锁定
rules.value: Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.

rules.desc: 道具一致性 — 所有 shot 追加道具锁定
rules.value: All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged.

rules.desc: 负向提示词 — 追加通用质量退化词汇
rules.value: multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration

rules.desc: 负向提示词 — 有对白镜头避免嘴型错误
rules.value: mouth mismatch, silent face, frozen expression, unnatural dubbing

rules.desc: 运镜规范 — 有 context_refs 时相机过渡要平滑
rules.value: Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots.
